title: Daring (disambiguation)
content:
'''Daring''' can refer to more than one thing:

*[[Daring (Strike-class)|''Daring'']], a [[Strike-class medium cruiser|Strike-class cruiser]].
*[[Daring (frigate)|''Daring'']], a [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] frigate.
*[[Daring (transport)|''Daring'']], a transport

{{Disambig}}
